title: Jean Ryall
compiled_truth: Jean Ryall is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-11-29 to 2001-12-03), Jean Ryall sent 24 and received 434 emails, totalling 458 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (16), [D  Steffes](people/d-steffes) (5), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (5), [Thane Twiggs](people/thane-twiggs) (4), [Doug Gilbert-Smith](people/doug-gilbert-smith) (3).
